basic_details.job_title: DWCWEO Palnadu District Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office Palnadu
basic_details.short_information: District Women Child Welfare & Empowerment Office Palnadu (DWCWEO Palnadu) District Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 08 May 2026 on the official website https://palnadu.ap.gov.in . Has been announced through the DWCWEO Palnadu District Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of Andhra Pradesh rules in force.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree / Post Graduate Diploma in Management / Social Sciences / Nutrition
qualification.details: Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Management/Social Sciences/Nutrition. Minimum 2 years' work experience of capacity building, with supervisory skills. Good oral and written communication skills in local language and fair skills in English. Ability to work in a team and willingness to travel extensively. Mandatorily local candidates should be engaged.

selection_process: Shortlisting of qualified candidates Interview Merit based selection
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DWCWEO Palnadu District Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://palnadu.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DWCWEO Palnadu District Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DWCWEO Palnadu District Project Assistant recruitment is 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the District Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the District Project Assistant post is 25 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the District Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the District Project Assistant post is 42 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the District Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree or Post Graduate Diploma in Management, Social Sciences, or Nutrition.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of work experience in capacity building with supervisory skills is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. Are local candidates mandatory for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, local candidates are mandatory for engagement in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the District Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of qualified candidates, followed by an interview, and finally merit-based selection.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DWCWEO Palnadu, which is https://palnadu.ap.gov.in.
